title: lobularia intermedia var. normalis
intro: Lobularia intermedia var. normalis, also known as Sweet Alyssum, is a low-growing, evergreen perennial herb that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is a popular ornamental plant, valued for its delicate white flowers and tolerance to drought and poor soil conditions. Lobularia intermedia var. normalis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues such as skin irritations and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, to be utilized.
